chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No. D-2043 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order as to non-prosecution of MA No.803/2018 as notice not issued as copies have not been supplied by the learned counsel for the petitioner. 13.02.2018. Mr. Shahid Hussain Baloch Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Jangu Khan Special Prosecutor NAB Mr. Aurengzeb Talpur DAG -=-=- Though today the application being MA No.803/2018 is fixed for order as to non- prosecution but it appears from the record that this petition was disposed of vide order dated 28.11.2017 and through said Misc. application, the petitioner has sought return of original passport which he had deposited/ submitted in compliance of the order passed by this court on 17.8.2016. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB has recorded no objection to the grant of instant application. In view of above, Misc. application No.803 of 2018 is allowed. Office is directed to return the original passport, if already lying with the office to petitioner after proper verification and identification. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
